executiveSummary.summary: Strong team and real problem, but entering a crowded, well-funded market with established players. The AI angle is both your biggest differentiator and highest risk. Vertical specialization is likely your only path to compete, but even then, you're fighting uphill against companies with 10x your resources and years of head start.

marketSize.sam: $2.8B GRC automation for mid-market (100-1000 employees globally)
marketSize.som: $50M realistic addressable market in first 2 years focusing on specific verticals
marketSize.methodology: Based on 280K mid-market companies globally, 15% needing compliance annually, average $3K annual spend

competitors.name: Vanta
competitors.description: Leading automated compliance platform with $150M+ funding
competitors.strength: Brand recognition, extensive integrations, enterprise sales team
competitors.weakness: Generic approach, weak in specialized verticals like healthcare

competitors.name: Drata
competitors.description: Compliance automation focused on continuous monitoring
competitors.strength: Strong continuous monitoring, good SOC 2 coverage
competitors.weakness: Limited multi-framework support, less AI sophistication

competitors.name: Secureframe
competitors.description: Y Combinator compliance platform targeting startups
competitors.weakness: Limited enterprise features, shallow compliance depth

competitors.name: Tugboat Logic
competitors.description: Enterprise GRC platform acquired by OneTrust

marketAnalysis.positioning: AI-powered compliance specialist for regulated verticals
marketAnalysis.timing: Good - new AI capabilities enable better automation, but market is already mature

valueProposition.coreProblem: Mid-market companies in regulated industries need compliance certifications to win enterprise deals but current solutions are either too expensive (consultants) or too generic (existing platforms)
valueProposition.targetCustomer: VP of Security or Compliance Officer at 100-500 employee companies in healthcare, fintech, or SaaS selling to enterprise
valueProposition.uniqueAngle: AI-generated, industry-specific compliance documentation that understands actual infrastructure context
valueProposition.whyNow: LLMs can now generate contextually accurate compliance documentation, and cloud infrastructure APIs provide real-time security posture visibility

businessModel.revenueStrategy: SaaS subscription with framework-based pricing tiers
businessModel.pricingFramework: $1,500/mo single framework, $2,500/mo multi-framework - priced at 20% of consultant cost but 80% gross margin

unitEconomics.estimatedCAC: $8,000 based on 4-month sales cycle, $2K/month sales cost per deal
unitEconomics.estimatedLTV: $54,000 assuming 18-month average retention, $2,500 average monthly revenue

businessModel.scalabilityAssessment: Scales well once integrations are built, but customer success becomes critical at scale due to compliance accuracy requirements

technicalFeasibility.recommendedStack: Python/FastAPI backend, React frontend, PostgreSQL, LangChain for AI, Terraform for infrastructure scanning

buildVsBuy.rationale: Core differentiator, need custom mapping logic
AI customization is key value prop
Auth0 or similar, not core competency

technicalRisks: API rate limits from cloud providers
technicalFeasibility.estimatedMvpTimeline: 4-6 months for single framework, single cloud provider

risks.description: Vanta and Drata have massive funding advantage and can copy your AI features within 6-12 months
risks.mitigation: Focus on vertical specialization they can't easily replicate

risks.description: AI-generated compliance documents contain errors that cause audit failures
risks.mitigation: Human review layer, liability insurance, conservative AI application

risks.description: Security buyers are skeptical of AI and prefer proven solutions
risks.mitigation: Lead with automation benefits, position AI as enhancement not replacement

risks.description: Long sales cycles burn cash faster than expected with current runway
risks.mitigation: Focus on faster-closing SMB deals initially

risks.description: Compliance frameworks change, requiring constant platform updates
risks.mitigation: Build modular framework engine, hire compliance experts

week1to4: Interview 50 healthcare CISOs about specific compliance pain points
Validate AI policy generation accuracy with 3 compliance experts
week5to8: Develop AI safety protocols and human review process
week9to12: Launch private beta with design partners
Begin building sales pipeline in target vertical

decisionAgenda.question: Horizontal vs vertical market entry strategy

options.tradeoff: Larger market but impossible to win against funded competitors
Smaller market but defensible specialization and compliance expertise

decisionAgenda.recommendation: Go vertical with healthcare - you can't out-execute Vanta with generic compliance, but you can become the healthcare compliance expert

decisionAgenda.question: AI positioning and safety approach

options.option: Lead with AI as main differentiator
options.tradeoff: Higher perceived value but higher risk and buyer skepticism
Safer positioning but less differentiated from competitors

decisionAgenda.recommendation: Downplay AI publicly, emphasize 'intelligent automation' - let the results speak rather than the technology

decisionAgenda.question: Pricing strategy for market entry

options.tradeoff: Sustainable margins but harder to displace incumbents
Easier customer acquisition but unsustainable unit economics

decisionAgenda.recommendation: Start 30% below incumbents ($1,000/$1,750) with vertical specialization premium - you need price advantage to overcome switching costs
